description_long: This apartment building features a modern, rectangular design with a red brick exterior and large, black-framed windows arranged in a symmetrical pattern on the front facade. The structure has two stories, with the ground floor including a prominent black garage door and a single main entrance door. The upper floor is partially open, revealing interior rooms with light-colored walls and wooden doors, as well as a section with patterned wall tiles. The rear and side facades are mostly solid brick with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The roof is flat, and there are no visible balconies or exterior decorative elements. The overall appearance is clean, functional, and typical of contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A two-story, red brick apartment building with large black-framed windows, a garage, and a flat roof, designed in a modern, functional style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large garage door, and symmetrical window arrangement on the brick facade.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the solid brick wall with minimal windows and the open upper floor interior layout.
description_view_2: Side view displaying a large window section and the flat roof, with the brick exterior dominating the facade.
description_view_3: Back view showing a continuous brick wall with no windows or doors, emphasizing privacy and security.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade in two vertical rows, with additional large windows on the side and minimal openings on the rear and other side.
